General.Name: New Universe International Group Ltd
General.Description: New Universe Environmental Group Limited, an investment holding company, primarily provides environmental treatment and disposal services in the People's Republic of China. The company engages in the provision of environmental treatment and disposal services for industrial and medical wastes; hazardous waste treatment and landfill services; general industrial waste; environmental industrial sewage and sludge treatment, and related utilities, including electric, gas, and water; and environmental technical consultancy services. It also offers environmental plating sewage treatment services and related facilities; and management services in an eco-plating specialized zone. In addition, the company invests in plastic materials dyeing business; and leases factory buildings and facilities. The company was formerly known as New Universe International Group Limited and changed its name to New Universe Environmental Group Limited in May 2016. New Universe Environmental Group Limited was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Telford House, Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong
